name: jithinm--qwen3-tts-local-inference
description: Generate speech from text using Qwen3-TTS via direct Python inference — no server required. Use when: (1) converting text to speech / synthesising audio, (2) creating voiceovers or spoken content, (3) cloning a voice from reference audio, (4) generating TTS with built-in speakers or custom voice descriptions. Supports custom-voice (9 speakers), voice-design (natural language), and voice-clone (~3 s reference). Outputs .wav files. Both 0.6B (small, default) and 1.7B (large) models available. Runs entirely offline after model download.
